_note: HOLD-OUT validation set — the overfitting check. The tuning loop must NOT open this file or tune toward these cases. The scorer reports holdout accuracy separately. If train accuracy climbs while holdout stalls or drops, the loop is overfitting keywords to the visible cases instead of genuinely improving triggering.

cases.prompt: Prepare visuals to walk leadership through the quarterly numbers.

Stand up a server that exposes our tools to the model.
Remember this as my standing preference going forward.
